raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Start with context","name":"Before we get specific, what feels most worth talking through today?","description":"Safe opener that lets Test set the agenda without steering into a problem frame.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision drag","name":"Where are decisions still hanging around longer than they should?","description":"Surfaces stalled choices that may be slowing the work without sounding like a generic blocker check.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Hidden rework","name":"What part of the work is creating extra churn for you?","description":"Looks for avoidable rework or process friction that the first blocker question may not catch.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ownership shift","name":"Where have you had to take the lead more than expected lately?","description":"Checks for unplanned ownership and whether the current scope is stretching or energizing them.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Update landing","name":"How are your updates landing with the people who rely on them?","description":"Probes whether communication is creating alignment or still leaving others unsure.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Tradeoff call","name":"What are you choosing not to do this cycle?","description":"Forces a real prioritization tradeoff and reveals whether the current focus is deliberate or crowded.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager leverage","name":"What would make the next two weeks easier from my side?","description":"Opens concrete asks for support, air cover, decisions, or context.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support gap","name":"What support are you not getting enough of right now?","description":"Surfaces missing support without presuming the answer is a problem with the work itself.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Sustainable pace","name":"Does this pace feel sustainable for the next couple of weeks?","description":"Checks whether the current cadence is holdable without overdriving the check-in into a burnout conversation.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Close on next step","name":"Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first?","description":"Leaves the meeting with a clear next focus and no new topic introduced.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
